auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Paperform API key used with the Authorization: Bearer <api_key> header. Generate or copy it from the Paperform developer account page: https://paperform.co/account/developer.

actions.name: get_form
actions.description: Get a Paperform form by slug, custom slug, or ID.

slug_or_id.description: The Paperform form slug, custom slug, or ID.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the form.
The default generated slug for the form.
The custom slug for the form if one is set.
The title of the form.
The description of the form.
The main sharing URL for the form.
Whether the form is currently accepting submissions.
The number of submissions the form has received.
The UTC datetime when the form was created.
The UTC datetime when the form was updated.

raw.description: The raw Paperform API object for advanced fields.

actions.name: get_form_coupon
actions.description: Get a Paperform coupon by form and coupon code.

slug_or_id.description: The Paperform form slug, custom slug, or ID.

inputSchema.description: The Paperform form coupon lookup input.

anyOf.description: The coupon code.
Whether the coupon is enabled.
The target of the coupon.
The discount as an amount.
The discount as a percentage.
The datetime when the coupon expires.

raw.description: The raw Paperform API object for advanced fields.

actions.name: get_form_field
actions.description: Get a Paperform form field by field key.

slug_or_id.description: The Paperform form slug, custom slug, or ID.

inputSchema.description: The Paperform form field lookup input.

anyOf.description: The unique key for this field.
The title of this field.
The description of this field.
The Paperform field type.
Whether this field is required.
The custom key of this field.
The placeholder for this field.

raw.description: The raw Paperform API object for advanced fields.

outputSchema.description: A single Paperform form field result.

actions.name: get_form_partial_submission
actions.description: Get a Paperform partial submission by form and partial submission ID.

slug_or_id.description: The Paperform form slug, custom slug, or ID.

inputSchema.description: The Paperform form partial submission lookup input.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the partial submission.
The ID of the Paperform form for this partial submission.

additionalProperties.description: A submitted answer value returned by Paperform.

data.description: Submission answers keyed by Paperform field key.

anyOf.description: The last answered field key when returned by Paperform.
The account-timezone datetime when the partial submission was submitted.
The account-timezone datetime when the partial submission was updated.
The account-timezone datetime when the partial submission was created.
The UTC datetime when the partial submission was submitted.
The UTC datetime when the partial submission was created.
The UTC datetime when the partial submission was updated.
The Paperform account timezone for this partial submission.

raw.description: The raw Paperform API object for advanced fields.

outputSchema.description: A single Paperform partial submission result.

actions.description: Get a Paperform product by form and SKU.

inputSchema.description: The Paperform form product lookup input.

anyOf.description: The Paperform product SKU.
The product name.
The available product quantity.
The product price.
The minimum number of products to be selected.
The maximum number of products to be selected.
Whether the product can be discounted.

raw.description: The raw Paperform API object for advanced fields.

actions.name: list_form_coupons
actions.description: List coupons for a Paperform form.

slug_or_id.description: The Paperform form slug, custom slug, or ID.

inputSchema.description: The Paperform form coupon list input.

anyOf.description: The coupon code.
Whether the coupon is enabled.
The target of the coupon.
The discount as an amount.
The discount as a percentage.
The datetime when the coupon expires.

coupons.description: The coupons returned for this form.

actions.name: list_form_fields
actions.description: List fields for a Paperform form.

slug_or_id.description: The Paperform form slug, custom slug, or ID.

inputSchema.description: Filters for listing Paperform form fields.

anyOf.description: The unique key for this field.
The title of this field.
The description of this field.
The Paperform field type.
Whether this field is required.
The custom key of this field.
The placeholder for this field.

fields.description: The fields returned for this form.

actions.name: list_form_partial_submissions
actions.description: List partial submissions for a Paperform form.

slug_or_id.description: The Paperform form slug, custom slug, or ID.

limit.description: The number of results to return.

skip.description: The number of results to skip in the result set.

after_id.description: Return results after this Paperform object ID.

before_id.description: Return results before this Paperform object ID.

before_date.description: Return results created on or after this UTC datetime. Paperform ignores this when before_id is provided.

after_date.description: Return results created before this UTC datetime. Paperform ignores this when after_id is provided.

sort.description: The direction used by Paperform to sort by created_at.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination controls for listing Paperform partial submissions.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier of the partial submission.
The ID of the Paperform form for this partial submission.

additionalProperties.description: A submitted answer value returned by Paperform.

data.description: Submission answers keyed by Paperform field key.

anyOf.description: The last answered field key when returned by Paperform.
The account-timezone datetime when the partial submission was submitted.
The account-timezone datetime when the partial submission was updated.
The account-timezone datetime when the partial submission was created.
The UTC datetime when the partial submission was submitted.
The UTC datetime when the partial submission was created.
The UTC datetime when the partial submission was updated.
The Paperform account timezone for this partial submission.

raw.description: The raw Paperform API object for advanced fields.

partial_submissions.description: The partial submissions returned for this page.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching items when returned.
Whether Paperform has more matching items.
The result limit Paperform applied.
The result offset Paperform applied.

raw.description: The raw Paperform API object for advanced fields.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Paperform partial submission list.
